title: デビュー戦の後に・ザ☆センター！

text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon finishes first in her debut race,
managing to secure center stage in a magnificent
winning concert.

Discovering the joy of standing center stage only
strengthens her resolve to become a top Umadol.

To get to the top, she'll need to build her fanbase
by running and performing as much as possible.

We set our sights on winning at least two races at
the Pre-Open level or higher during junior year to
jump-start her fame.
